title: Weather Becomes a Weapon
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on weather becomes a weapon, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Weather Becomes a Weapon. Nami fights Miss Doublefinger and learns how to use Usopp’s strange weapon under deadly pressure. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's the latest technology in Grand Line! You can make objects eat devil fruits now!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could a gun ever move around on its own?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's not as if the devil fruit has a will of its own!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shutyourplehole! What sittoya anyways!? Yergomabe deadsoon!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This gun here moves and that's that!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: In any case, you two ain't getting outta here alive. This is our territory you've step foot in!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: I'm a mole for cryin' out loud!

summary: This part develops weather becomes a weapon and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
